testcase.name: test_navigate_to_register_page[chromium]

failure.message: AssertionError: Page title expected to be 'Register Account' Actual value: Call log: - Expect "to_have_title" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value ""

testcase.failure:
page = <Page url='chrome-error://chromewebdata/'>
@pytest.mark.sanity @pytest.mark.regression def test_navigate_to_register_page(page: Page): """ Validate different ways of navigating to 'Register Account' page """ home_page = HomePage(page)
# 1. Open the Application (Handled by fixture above)
# 2. Click on 'My Account' Drop menu home_page.click_my_account()
# 3. Click on 'Register' option (ER-1) home_page.click_register() > expect(page).to_have_title("Register Account") E AssertionError: Page title expected to be 'Register Account' E Actual value: E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_title" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value ""
tests\ui\Register\TC_RF_007_test.py:34: AssertionError
